base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of run_horizontal — a character from 1987 contra. horizontal shoot posture. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame run cycle — horizontal shoot posture; Bill red / Lance blue palette-swap
